description: Following an investigation, a decision has been made to terminate an employee for gross misconduct.

nodes.task_description: Prepare the termination paperwork, including the separation agreement and final paycheck.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP prepares all necessary offboarding documents.

nodes.task_description: Schedule and conduct the termination meeting with the employee and their manager.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP and manager deliver the termination notice to the employee.

nodes.task_description: Process the termination in the HRIS and coordinate with IT to deactivate all system access immediately.

expected_outcome.value: HRBP updates the employee's status to 'Terminated' and triggers IT de-provisioning.
